improvements.title: Strengthen Causal Discovery with Multiple Testing Correction and Sensitivity Analysis
critiques_addressed: Causal discovery (PC/FCI/GES) is the weakest link: unverified, with faithfulness assumptions, sample complexity concerns, and no multiple testing correction
changes: Add Holm-Bonferroni multiple testing correction to PC algorithm CI tests
Implement FCI algorithm for handling latent confounders (relaxes causal sufficiency)
Add faithfulness sensitivity analysis measuring stability of edges under perturbation
Add structural Hamming distance (SHD) evaluation metric for DAG recovery
Implement windowed structural change detection with Bonferroni-corrected break tests

improvements.title: Formal Soundness Theorem and Arithmetic Circuit Verification
critiques_addressed: Probabilistic-to-logical proof bridge lacks a formal soundness theorem connecting probabilistic semantics to QF_LRA formulas
Arithmetic circuit compilation is unverified—errors would silently propagate through the entire proof chain
TCB is substantially larger than claimed: only 2 of 9 verification chain links are formally verified
changes: Implement formal soundness theorem with machine-checkable proof structure
Add brute-force verification of arithmetic circuit outputs for small instances
Add circuit property certifier (decomposability + determinism with counterexample)
Implement proof object extraction from Z3 (SMTLIB2 proof format)
Add CVC5 cross-validation via subprocess for dual-solver verification
Implement the SoundnessTheorem class with explicit statement, assumptions, and proof steps

improvements.title: Real-World Manipulation Case Evaluation
critiques_addressed: Evaluation is limited to synthetic LOB data with planted manipulation; no validation against real documented manipulation cases
changes: Implement SEC enforcement action scenarios: Sarao 2010 spoofing, Coscia 2015 layering, wash trading patterns
Build full evaluation benchmark with detection rates, false positive rates, evidence strength metrics
Add calibrated LOB simulator with realistic microstructure statistics
Implement manipulation planting for spoofing, layering, wash trading with ground truth
Add adversarial trainer with strategy space exploration and coverage bounds
Run comprehensive experiments and generate results JSON

finalization: Rewrite tool_paper.tex as standalone 30-page arxiv paper
